channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Microsoft AI investments cause cloud operating income growth to plunge
item.description: Microsoft on Wednesday reported strong earnings, but the percentage increase in its intelligent cloud operating income has dropped off sharply. It reported that, for Q2 of its 2025 fiscal year, the revenue increased $1.3 billion, a 14% boost.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Apple's iPhone sales during the holiday season slipped despite a highly anticipated AI rollout
item.description: Apple on Thursday disclosed its iPhone sales dipped slightly during the holiday-season quarter, signaling a sluggish start to the trendsetting company’s effort to catch up to the rest of Big Tech in the race to bring artificial intelligence to the masses.
item.dc:creator: Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Coming soon
item.description: The Deepseek-R1 model has managed to attract a lot of attention in a short time, especially because it can be used commercially without restrictions.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How federal land could generate lots of electricity
item.description: "We estimate 10 to 20 million homes could be served from the electricity that are produced from that renewable energy," said Trieu Mai. The post How federal land could generate lots of electricity first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Amazon sues state agency to block release of company records to Bezos-owned Washington Post
item.description: Amazon is suing a Washington state agency to prevent the release of some company materials to The Washington Post, the newspaper which is owned by Amazon founder Jeff Bezos.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Vodafone Hits Major Landmark in Satellite Video Calls - A New Era for Connectivity?
item.description: Vodafone's demo of a 'space video call' using a standard smartphone marks a significant milestone in the development of satellite connectivity, aiming to eliminate dead zones and provide mobile broadband services to underserved areas.
item.dc:creator: mark.wilson@futurenet.com (Mark Wilson), TechRadar

item.title: Annoyed Samsung fans have started a petition to bring Bluetooth back to the S Pen – and they have a point
item.description: Several thousand Samsung fans have signed a petition calling for the reintroduction of Bluetooth to the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra’s S Pen, after connectivity was removed with the new S25 Ultra.
item.dc:creator: jamie.richards@futurenet.com (Jamie Richards), TechRadar

item.title: OpenAI to partner with US National Laboratories to boost national security
item.description: OpenAI announced Thursday it is partnering with the Los Alamos National Laboratory to install its newest artificial intelligence models onto the lab's supercomputer for national security research. "We care a lot about AI and science, we've talked about this for a very long time.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: CompTIA unveils AI Essentials training resource
item.description: Artificial intelligence is changing how work gets done, creating new technology roles, and transforming the entire employment landscape.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The oldest evidence for lead pollution comes from ancient Greece
item.description: Researchers have found the oldest known evidence of lead pollution dating to around 5,200 years ago in ancient Greece.
item.dc:creator: Christina Larson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: ServiceNow adds AI Agent Orchestrator, Studio to its Now platform
item.description: ServiceNow has added more support for agentic AI to its cloud-based Now platform for digital workflow operations to help enterprises manage enterprises more easily while increasing productivity.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: RX 9070 GPU could theoretically be an RTX 5070 killer, I’m just worried that AMD may not go for Nvidia’s throat with pricing
item.description: AMD’s RX 9070 XT could outgun Nvidia’s RTX 5070 Ti easily, and come within 10% of the RTX 5080 GPU, if fresh rumors prove correct.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Netflix reveals June 2025 release date for Squid Game season 3, and its first clip teases a new mini-game that'll have a big impact on Gi-hun and his fellow contestants
item.description: Squid Game's third and final season will be with us sooner than you think – and its first-look images have got me worried for Gi-hun's safety.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: AI agents are proving remarkably popular - but firms still face a host of challenges
item.description: Most European businesses have or will use AI agents to tackle increasing IT workloads and boost efficiency.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Where to buy Nvidia RTX 5090: launch day is today, and these are the retailers I'd check
item.description: The Nvidia RTX 5090 is an absolute powerhouse of a GPU, and it's unsurprisingly going to be in high demand. Here's where we recommend you look for one when it goes on sale today.
item.dc:creator: christian.guyton@futurenet.com (Christian Guyton), TechRadar

item.title: Marvel Rivals crosshairs: how to change and import them
item.description: Here's everything you need to know about Marvel Rivals crosshairs. This includes info on how to change your crosshairs, as well as the best crosshairs codes to use depending on your play style.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Fragmented cybersecurity is costing businesses billions, and putting them at risk
item.description: IBM report reveals how platformization can help businesses reduce costs and improve their security postures.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: 5 reasons the enterprise data center will never die
item.description: In 2019, Gartner analyst Dave Cappuccio issued the headline-grabbing prediction that by 2025, 80% of enterprises will have shut down their traditional data centers and moved everything to the cloud.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Alibaba introduces Qwen 2.5-Max AI model, claims edge over DeepSeek
item.description: China’s Alibaba Group has launched an upgraded version of its Qwen 2.5 AI model, claiming it outperforms models from DeepSeek, OpenAI, and Meta, as competition in the AI market intensifies.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Microsoft reports 10% quarterly profit growth as it works to show AI investments paying off
item.description: Microsoft said Wednesday that its profit for the October-December quarter grew 10% as it works to capitalize on the huge amounts of money it has spent to advance its artificial intelligence technology.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Verizon brings AI suite to enterprise infrastructure customers
item.description: Verizon Business has launched AI Connect, an integrated suite of products designed to let businesses deploy generative artificial intelligence (AI) workloads at scale.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How to make sure you’ve got the cybersecurity people you need
item.description: The government's personnel shop has devised a five-part strategy for planning, hiring and retaining cybersecurity people. But not everyone follows the strategy. The post How to make sure you’ve got the cybersecurity people you need first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Most in new poll disapprove of Musk's role in Trump administration
item.description: Most registered voters disapprove of tech billionaire Elon Musk’s role in the Trump administration, according to a poll released Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: Did DeepSeek copy ChatGPT to make new AI chatbot? Trump adviser thinks so
item.description: Did the upstart Chinese tech company DeepSeek copy ChatGPT to make the artificial intelligence technology that shook Wall Street this week? That's what ChatGPT maker OpenAI is suggesting, along with U.S. President Donald Trump's top AI adviser.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: 200 UK companies adopt a permanent four-day work week
item.description: Two years after participating in a groundbreaking four-day work week experiment, 200 companies in the UK have chosen to adopt the policy permanently, marking a significant shift in workplace norms.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: General purpose AI could lead to array of new risks, experts say in report ahead of AI summit
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Advanced artificial intelligence systems have the potential to create extreme new risks, such as fueling widespread job losses, enabling terrorism or running amok, experts said in a first-of-its-kind international report Wednesday cataloging the range of dangers posed by the technology
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Industry coalition presses DOGE to act on digital identity
item.description: Digital identity advocates are calling on Trump administration to boost the use of mobile drivers licenses and other digital identity verification use cases. The post Industry coalition presses DOGE to act on digital identity first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: How to share a YouTube video starting at a specific time
item.description: Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says these steps ensure that your friends and family get to the exact moment you want them to see. Try it out and streamline your sharing experience.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sweden seizes vessel suspected of 'sabotage' after undersea data cable rupture in Baltic Sea
item.description: RIGA, Latvia (AP) — Swedish prosecutors announced Sunday night that they have opened a preliminary investigation into suspected aggravated “sabotage” and ordered the detention of a vessel in the Baltic Sea suspected of damaging an underwater fiber optic cable connecting Latvia and the Swedish island
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Biggest Wi-Fi mistakes you can make on a plane
item.description: It's hard to imagine life without in-flight Wi-Fi these days – but sky-high web surfing comes with its own set of privacy concerns. Here's how to protect yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
